accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content is grounded in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill amends the USEC Privatization Act to ban Russian uranium imports.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes amendment to USEC Privatization Act and describes conforming amendments including removal of prior limits.

exceptions_conditions.why: Covers DOE national security exception, non-uranium isotopes exception, and waiver conditions.

effective_dates.why: States 90-day effective date, waiver termination Jan 1 2028, and Dec 31 2040 prohibition sunset.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions: ban, anti-circumvention, waiver, caps, enforcement, notification, sunset, conforming amendments.

correct_entities.why: All agencies and statutes correctly named.

correct_figures.why: All kilogram quantities and dates accurately stated.
